Welcome to gempyor's documentation!¶

Modules

gempyor.model_info

Abstractions for interacting with the model as a monolithic object.

gempyor.parameters

Abstractions for interacting with the parameters configurations.

gempyor.inference

Defines handlers to the gempyor module.

gempyor.compartments

Defines class, methods, and functions necessary to establising compartments in the model.
